data.title: model-id-lint: validate.sh check times out at 60s
data.description: The model-id-lint check in validate.sh consistently times out at 60s (TIMEOUT logged in validation-timeouts.log). Observed twice on 2026-04-11 at 17:12:20 and 17:13:36. Root cause: unknown — possibly a slow grep or pattern match over a large file set. Needs investigation to either fix the lint check performance or increase timeout.
